expected_behavior: Loads golden standards from the standards/ directory
Creates a task checklist for progress tracking
Runs gather-connector-context.sh to collect connector metadata
Identifies postgres as a SQL connector type
Launches all 5 review agents in parallel: silent-failure-hunter, pr-test-analyzer, type-design-analyzer, code-simplifier, and comment-resolution-checker
Applies the systematic review checklist from references/review-checklists.md
Generates a full review report with severity-categorized findings and a merge verdict
